name: Chinook demo benchmark
description: Curated NL→SQL questions on the Chinook music store schema. Designed as a realistic 'business analyst workload' rather than the hard-mode BIRD edge cases. Target accuracy ≥ 90% — these are the kinds of questions a product would actually serve.

questions.question: How many albums are in the catalog?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Album

questions.question: How many tracks are there in total?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track

questions.question: How many customers do we have?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer

questions.question: List the names of all genres.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Genre

questions.question: List all media types.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM MediaType

questions.question: Which customers are from Germany?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Germany'

questions.question: List the customers from Brazil.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Brazil'

questions.question: What is the average track length in milliseconds?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) FROM Track

questions.question: What is the total revenue across all invoices?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice

questions.question: What is the most expensive track price?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT MAX(UnitPrice) FROM Track

questions.question: List all album titles by the artist AC/DC.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Title FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Artist.Name = 'AC/DC'

questions.question: Which artists have the genre Jazz in their catalog?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId JOIN Track ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Jazz'

questions.question: List the names of tracks in the album 'Let There Be Rock'.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Let There Be Rock'

questions.question: How many customers are in each country?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) FROM Customer GROUP BY Country

questions.question: How many tracks does each genre have?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, COUNT(*) FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name

questions.question: What is the total revenue per country?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry

questions.question: Who are the top 5 customers by total spending?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS total FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: What are the 5 longest tracks?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY Milliseconds DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: Which 3 countries have the most customers, and how many customers does each have?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS n FROM Customer GROUP BY Country ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 3

questions.question: Which artist has the most albums?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many invoices were issued in 2010?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2010'

questions.question: What is the total revenue for the year 2011?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2011'

questions.question: Total revenue per genre.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, SUM(InvoiceLine.UnitPrice * InvoiceLine.Quantity) AS revenue FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine ON InvoiceLine.TrackId = Track.TrackId GROUP BY Genre.Name

questions.question: Which employee has the highest total sales?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Employee.FirstName, Employee.LastName FROM Employee JOIN Customer ON Customer.SupportRepId = Employee.EmployeeId JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId GROUP BY Employee.EmployeeId ORDER BY SUM(Invoice.Total) DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: List the distinct tracks in the playlist '90’s Music'.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN PlaylistTrack ON PlaylistTrack.TrackId = Track.TrackId JOIN Playlist ON Playlist.PlaylistId = PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId WHERE Playlist.Name = '90’s Music'

questions.question: What is the average invoice total per country?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT BillingCountry, AVG(Total) FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry

questions.question: Which countries have more than 5 customers?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Country FROM Customer GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*) > 5

questions.question: Which artists have more than 3 albums?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId GROUP BY Artist.ArtistId HAVING COUNT(*) > 3

questions.question: Which tracks belong to the Rock genre?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Track.Name FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Rock'

questions.question: List all playlists.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Playlist

questions.question: Which employees are based in Calgary?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Employee WHERE City = 'Calgary'

questions.question: List the invoice IDs and totals for invoices billed to the city of Paris.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT InvoiceId, Total FROM Invoice WHERE BillingCity = 'Paris'

questions.question: How many employees report to nobody (i.e., have no manager)?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Employee WHERE ReportsTo IS NULL

questions.question: What is the minimum track price?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(UnitPrice) FROM Track

questions.question: List the genres of tracks on the album 'Restless and Wild'.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Restless and Wild'

questions.question: Which artist made the album 'Big Ones'?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Artist.Name FROM Artist JOIN Album ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Album.Title = 'Big Ones'

questions.question: Which 3 genres have the most tracks?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.GenreId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 3

questions.question: Which customer made the largest single invoice?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId ORDER BY Invoice.Total DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Top 10 longest albums by total track duration.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album JOIN Track ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId GROUP BY Album.AlbumId ORDER BY SUM(Track.Milliseconds) DESC LIMIT 10

questions.question: For each customer, list their first name, last name, and how many invoices they have.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName, COUNT(Invoice.InvoiceId) FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId

questions.question: Total revenue for January 2010.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) = '2010-01'

questions.question: How many invoices were issued in the second quarter of 2012?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', InvoiceDate) BETWEEN '2012-04' AND '2012-06'

questions.question: Which genres have at least 100 tracks?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.GenreId HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100

questions.question: Which customers have spent more than 40 dollars in total?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId GROUP BY Customer.CustomerId HAVING SUM(Invoice.Total) > 40

questions.question: What is the total revenue for the country Germany?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(Total) FROM Invoice WHERE BillingCountry = 'Germany'

questions.question: Which media types are used by tracks in the Pop genre?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MediaType.Name FROM MediaType JOIN Track ON Track.MediaTypeId = MediaType.MediaTypeId JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId WHERE Genre.Name = 'Pop'

questions.question: Which customers bought tracks from the album 'Greatest Hits'?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Customer.FirstName, Customer.LastName FROM Customer JOIN Invoice ON Invoice.CustomerId = Customer.CustomerId JOIN InvoiceLine ON InvoiceLine.InvoiceId = Invoice.InvoiceId JOIN Track ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Greatest Hits'

questions.question: List the tracks that cost more than 1 dollar.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE UnitPrice > 1

questions.question: What fraction of tracks belong to the Rock genre?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Genre.Name = 'Rock' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM Track JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId

questions.question: Average track length per genre.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Genre.Name, AVG(Track.Milliseconds) FROM Genre JOIN Track ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId GROUP BY Genre.Name

questions.question: Top 5 cities by total revenue.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT BillingCity FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCity ORDER BY SUM(Total) DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: What are the distinct billing countries from invoices?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT BillingCountry FROM Invoice

questions.question: List the albums that have zero tracks linked to them.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Title FROM Album WHERE AlbumId NOT IN (SELECT AlbumId FROM Track WHERE AlbumId IS NOT NULL)

questions.question: Which customers have never made a purchase?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Customer WHERE CustomerId NOT IN (SELECT CustomerId FROM Invoice)

questions.question: Names of tracks composed by Angus Young.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track WHERE Composer LIKE '%Angus Young%'

questions.question: How many distinct genres are represented in the catalog?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT GenreId) FROM Track

questions.question: Which playlists contain the track 'Eruption'?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Playlist.Name FROM Playlist JOIN PlaylistTrack ON PlaylistTrack.PlaylistId = Playlist.PlaylistId JOIN Track ON Track.TrackId = PlaylistTrack.TrackId WHERE Track.Name = 'Eruption'

questions.question: Which is the cheapest track in the catalog?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM Track ORDER BY UnitPrice ASC, TrackId ASC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many tracks does the album 'Use Your Illusion I' have?
questions.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId WHERE Album.Title = 'Use Your Illusion I'

questions.question: Number of invoices per year.
questions.gold_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) AS year, COUNT(*) FROM Invoice GROUP BY year
